**What you would like looptight to do**

**Why this fits looptight**

looptight stays small, provider-neutral, and validation-first, with no runtime
dependencies. Briefly note how the request keeps that bar (or why the trade-off is
worth it). See [`docs/SPEC.md`](../../docs/SPEC.md) for what looptight is and is not.
